content-right-description2:
Overview

A multiblock used for planet discovery, burning planet id chips, asteroid discovery and distance analysing of planets.

Planet discovery
By clicking 'Scan for planets' and having a Item output block, distance data and galaxy database in the bottom left slot the observatory will open and search for planets.
Discovered planets will be saved on the galaxy database (don't lose it).

Asteroid discovery
For asteroid discovery you will require an Item input block, an Item output block, distance data and asteroid chips.
To scan for asteroids, the asteroid chips have to be placed into the item input slot, and you will have to click 'scan for asteroids', after discovering a asteroid the chip with the id will be outputed to the item output block.
On avarage one astreroid scan will require 1000 distance data.

Analysing planets
To analyse a planet you will need to give the observatory distance data, click 'open galaxy', select the target planet and click 'analyse'.

Burning chips
To burn planet info to a plane id chip (wich is required for rocket flight) you will need to place a planet id chip into the bottom right side, click on 'open galaxy', select your target planet and click 'burn to chip' (this will require having the planet analysed)

Syncing databses
If you want to combined the data of two databases, place them in the two bottom left slots and click 'Sync Storage Disc'.
This will add the info of both databases two both chips.
